response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Mismatch detected; the Reference JSON incorrectly stated no vocal music, but vocals were identified at the end of the segment. 2. JSON Usage: Reference JSON was discarded for the vocal portion; manual transcription and translation were performed for the song 'Violet' by Ninomae Ina'nis. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely anchored to vocal onsets; prominent on-screen announcement text was also subtitled during the instrumental portions.
